title: Resolution Encouraging All Sangguniang Barangays in the Municipality of Los Baños to Appropriate Funds for the Procurement of Medical Oxygen Tanks for Their Respective Ambulances and Accordingly Ensure That These Oxygen Tanks Have Enough Medical Oxygen Supply for the Use of Constituents During Emergency Cases. (AUTHOR : COUNCILOR MARK LESTER B. DIZON, 09/27/2021)
